name: generate_docx
description:
Compatibility fallback: create or replace a professional DOCX (Word) document at the specified path within a registered source directory.

Prefer `run_shell` + `doc-script-editor` (`create_docx`, `validate`, optional `render`, and `unpack`/`pack` for template surgery) for serious DOCX creation, template-aware output, visual QA, validation, or follow-up edits. Use this native tool only when Python is unavailable or the document is simple enough for the structured schema. If using this fallback for markdown-to-DOCX, put markdown directly in `content.markdown`; do not create a .md file first unless the user explicitly asked for both.

Capabilities:
- Direct markdown-to-DOCX input via `content.markdown` (headings, paragraphs, bullets, numbered lists, blockquote callouts, and pipe tables)
- Cover page with title, subtitle, and cover note
- Themed colors and fonts (primary, accent, title font, body font)
- Page headers and footers
- Sections with headings, body text, bullet lists, numbered lists, hyperlinks, callout boxes, and tables
- Page breaks between sections
- Body text auto-detects inline bullets (lines starting with "- " or "• ")

Design tips:
- Use `theme` to set brand colors and fonts consistently
- Use `callout` for important highlights (info/warning/success tones)
- Use `numbered_items` for step-by-step instructions
- Use `links` to add clickable hyperlinks in sections
- Set `header`/`footer` for consistent page branding
- Use `page_break_before: true` to start major sections on fresh pages

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must end in .docx and be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the DOCX document.

title.description: Document cover title. Rendered large and bold at the top.

subtitle.description: Subtitle shown below the title in italics.

cover_note.description: Small note text below the subtitle (e.g. date, author, version).

header.description: Text shown in the page header (top-right of every page). Optional.

footer.description: Text shown in the page footer (bottom-center of every page). Optional.

theme.description: Visual theme for colors and fonts.

primary_color.description: Primary color hex (e.g. "1F4E79"). Used for title text and table headers.

accent_color.description: Accent color hex (e.g. "2E75B6"). Used for headings and decorative elements.

title_font.description: Font family for titles and headings. Default: "Calibri Light".

body_font.description: Font family for body text. Default: "Calibri".

title_align.description: Alignment of the cover title/subtitle. Default: "center".

markdown.description: Optional markdown source to convert directly into DOCX sections. Supports headings, paragraphs, bullets, numbered lists, blockquotes, and pipe tables. Use this instead of creating a temporary .md file when the final user-requested artifact is DOCX.

sections.description: Array of document sections. Each section can contain multiple content elements. Optional when `markdown` is provided.

body.description: Body text. Supports newlines. Lines starting with "- " or "• " auto-render as bullets.

bullet_items.description: Explicit bullet list items. Each string becomes a bullet point.

numbered_items.description: Numbered list items. Each string becomes a numbered item (1., 2., 3., etc.).

links.description: Clickable hyperlinks rendered as blue underlined text.

callout.description: Highlighted callout box with colored background.

tone.description: Visual tone: info (blue), warning (yellow), success (green). Default: "info".

table.description: Data table with optional headers and styled rows.

title.description: Table caption shown above the table.

headers.description: Column headers (rendered with primary color background, white text).

rows.description: Table data rows. Each row is an array of cell strings.

column_widths.description: Relative column width weights (e.g. [2, 1, 1]). Default: equal widths.

page_break_before.description: If true, insert a page break before this section. Default: false.
